# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <h1>Comments</h1>
    <div class="comments-section">
        @foreach($comments as $comment)
            <div class="comment">
                <h4>{{ $comment->user->name }}</h4>
                <p>{!! clean($comment->content) !!}</p>
                <small>Posted on {{ $comment->created_at->format('F j, Y, g:i a') }}</small>
            </div>
            <hr>
        @endforeach
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
